title: Avoid identical implementations in conditional structures
description:
Having all branches of a switch or if chain with the same implementation indicates a problem.

Either there is a copy-paste error that needs fixing or an unnecessary switch or if chain that should be removed.

This rule does not apply to if chains without else, nor to switch without a default clause.
recommendation: Review and refactor the conditional structure to avoid identical implementations.
impact: Potential security vulnerabilities and code duplication.

checks.message: Identical implementations found in conditional structures
